visual_description: A group of people in a dimly lit office space, some seated at desks with monitors, others standing near a whiteboard covered in diagrams and notes. One man in a suit stands at the front, gesturing toward the board while others face him, some leaning forward attentively. Several individuals have lanyards and appear engaged in a focused meeting or briefing.
audio_description: The audio clip begins with a single male voice, speaking Mandarin Chinese in a clear, formal, and authoritative tone. The recording environment is acoustically controlled, with only a faint, steady electronic hiss in the background, and no other ambient sounds or voices present. As the speaker finishes the phrase “交易” (“transaction”), a dramatic orchestral musical sting immediately begins.
